title: TechBlock - Tech
description: A survival modpack on 1.7.10 with quest and many other mods
body:
[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a3d826d24fdddf29427455ac46b78607695c34d.png)](https://bedrockhost.pl/?utm_source=techblock-pl&utm_medium=url&utm_campaign=modrinth)

Click banner above to create your own server on this modpack

The list of mods on this modpack is quite large, they have been carefully selected, and their recipes have been properly modified to bring maximum fun and entertainment for many hours of play. Whether you will be a crazy engineer or a skilled automaton is up to you, but know that on this modpack you will look at the sun differently, for example.

**Website:** https://techblock.pl
